title: ensure_connected returns &mut Client that all callers discard
description: ensure_connected<'a>(state: &'a mut WolfHsmState, ...) -> Result<&'a mut Client, SecretError> returns a borrow of the client, but every call site is 'ensure_connected(&mut guard, ...)?;' — the Ok value is immediately dropped. All callers then re-access the client via guard.connected_client(). The lifetime 'a annotation adds noise with no benefit. Fix: change return type to Result<(), SecretError> and remove the lifetime annotation.
